title: Enuberium Enhanced
description: An optimal modpack uses vulkan to optmize minecraft with the help of another mods.
body:
---

## **Enuberium – Optimization Minecraft Modpack**

**Enuberium** is a high-performance Minecraft modpack designed to maximize framerate and responsiveness using Vulkan and other cutting-edge optimization mods. Built for Fabric and tailored to Minecraft **1.21.10**, Enuberium focuses on client-side performance improvements without sacrificing visual quality. 

### **What Makes Enuberium Special**

Enuberium combines advanced rendering optimization with intelligent culling and lightweight performance enhancements to deliver a smoother gameplay experience on a wide range of systems.

### **Core Mods Included**

* **VulkanMod** — Provides a Vulkan-powered rendering backend for improved efficiency and performance. 
* **Lithium** — Enhances game logic and reduces CPU overhead. 
* **FerriteCore** — Improves memory utilization and reduces lag spikes. 
* **Entity Culling** & **More Culling** — Prevents off-screen objects from rendering unnecessarily. 
* **Flyspeed (Creative Flight)** — Offers optimized creative flight mechanics. 
* **Cloth Config API** & config libs — For easy configuration and customization. 
* **Fabric API** — Core Fabric support for mod functionality. 

### **Experience Highlights**

* **Massive FPS boosts** thanks to Vulkan and smart culling
* **Reduced CPU and memory load** for smoother performance
* **Minimalistic yet powerful setup** focused entirely on optimization

**Enuberium** is ideal for players who want a **clean, highly optimized Minecraft experience** with modern rendering enhancements and minimal performance overhead. ([Modrinth][2])
